title: kubeadm alpha
text:
kubeadm alpha
Caution:
kubeadm alpha
provides a preview of a set of features made available for gathering feedback
from the community. Please try it out and give us feedback!
Currently there are no experimental commands under
kubeadm alpha
.
What's next
kubeadm init
to bootstrap a Kubernetes control-plane node
kubeadm join
to connect a node to the cluster
kubeadm reset
to revert any changes made to this host by
kubeadm init
or
kubeadm join
Feedback
Was this page helpful?
Yes
No
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.
